text: sefer toledot yeshu'a hamashicha ben-david ben-averaham
averaham holid et-yitsechaq veyitsechaq holid et-ya'aqov veya'aqov holid et-yehuda veet-echayv
vihuda holid et-perets veet-zerach mitamar uferets holid et-chetseron vechetseron holid et-ram
veram holid et-'aminadav ve'aminadav holid et-nacheshon venacheshon holid et-salemon
vesalemon holid et-bo'az merachav vevo'az holid et-'oved merut ve'oved holid et-yishay
veyishay holid et-david hamelekh vedavid hamelekh holid et-shelomo meeshet uriya
ushelomo holid et-rechave'am urechave'am holid et-aviya vaaviya holid et-asa
veasa holid et-yehoshafat vihoshafat holid et-yoram veyoram holid et 'uziyahu
ve'uziyahu holid et-yotam veyotam holid et-achaz veachaz holid et-yechizeqiyahu
vichizeqiyahu holid et-menashe umenashe holid et-amon veamon holid et-yoshiyahu
veyoshiyahu holid et-yekhaneyahu veet-echayv le'et galut bavel
veacharey gelotam bavela holid yekhaneyahu et shealetiel ushealetiel holid et-zerubavel
uzerubavel holid et-avihud vaavihud holid et-eleyaqim veeleyaqim holid et 'azur
ve'azur holid et-tsadoq vetsadoq holid et-yakhin veyakhin holid et-elihud
veelihud holid et-ele'azar veele'azar holid et-matan umatan holid et-ya'aqov
veya'aqov holid et-yosef ba'al mireyam asher mimena nolad yeshu'a haniqera mashicha
vehine kal-hadorot min-averaham 'ad-david areba'a 'asar dorot umin-david 'ad-galut bavel areba'a 'asar dorot umigalut bavel 'ad-hamashicha areba'a 'asar dorot
veze devar huledet yeshu'a hamashicha mireyam imo hayeta meorasa leyosef uveterem yavo eleyha nimetset hara merucha haqodesh
veyosef ba'elah ish tsadiq velo ava letitah lecherepa vayomer ashalechena basater
hu chshev kazot vehine maleakh yeho nirea elayv bachalom vayomar yosef ben-david al-tira miqachat et mireyam ishetekha ki hanotsar beqireba merucha haqodesh hu
vehi yoledet ben veqarata et-shemo yeshu'a ki hu yoshi'a et-'amo mechatoteyhem
vekhal-zot hayeta lemalot et-devar yeho asher-diber beyad hanavi lemor
hine ha'alema hara veyoledet ben veqareu shemo 'imanuel asher perusho hael 'imanu
vayiqats yosef mishenato vaya'as kaasher tsivahu maleakh yeho vayeesof et-isheto el beyto
velo yeda'ah 'ad ki-yaleda ben et-bekhorah vayiqera et-shemo yeshu'a
vayehi bimey horedos hamelekh kaasher nolad yeshu'a beveyt-lechem yehuda vayavou megushim meerets mizerach yerushalayim
vayomeru aye melekh hayehudim asher yulad ki rainu et-kokhavo bamizerach vanavo lehishetachaot lo
vayehi kishemo'a horedos hamelekh et-divereyhem vayecherad hu vekhal-yerushalayim 'imo
vayaqehel et-kal-rashey hakohanim vesoferey ha'am vayisheal otam lemor eyfo yivaled hamashicha
vayomeru lo beveyt-lechem yehuda ki-khen katuv beyad hanavi
veata beyt-lechem erets yehuda eynekha tsa'ir bealufey yehuda ki mimekha yetse moshel asher yire'e et-'ami yiserael
az qara horedos lamegushym baseter vayacheqor lada'at ha'et asher nirea hakokhav
vayishelachem beyt-lechem vayomar lekhu chiqeru heytev 'al-devar hana'ar vehaya ki-timetseun oto vehigadetem li veavoa lehishetachaot-lo gam-ani
vayehi keshame'am et-diverey hamelekh vayelekhu vehine hakokhav asher-rau vamizerach halakh lifeneyhem 'ad asher-ba vaya'amod mima'al laasher-haya sham hayaled
vayireu et-hakokhav vayisemechu simecha gedola 'ad-meod
vayavou habayeta vayimetseu et-hayeled 'im-mireyam imo vayipelu 'al-peneyhem vayishetachavu-lo vayifetechu et-otserotam vayaqerivu lo minecha zahav ulevona vamor
vayetsuuu vachalom levileti shuv el-horedos vayelekhu bederekh acher el-aretsam

hem halekhu misham vehine maleakh yeho nirea el-yosef bachalom lemor qum qach et-hayeled veet-imo uverach-lekha mitserayema veheyeh-sham 'ad-im amareti eleykha ki horedos mevaqesh et-nefesh hana'ar leqachetah
vayaqam vayiqach et-hayeled veet-imo layela vayiverach mitserayema
vayehi-sham 'ad mot horedos lemalt et-devar yeho beyad hanavi lemor mimitserayim qarati liveni
vayare horedos ki hetelu vo hamegushim vayiqetsof meod vayishelach vayaharog et-kal-hayeladim asher beveyt-lechem uvekhal-gevuleyha lemiben-shenatayim ulemata lefi ha'et asher chaqar mipi hamegushim
az huqam haneemar befi yiremeyahu hanavi lemor
qol berama nishema' nehi uvekhi tamerurim rachel mevaka 'al-baneyha meana lehinachem 'al-baneyha ki eynenu
vayehi acharey mot horedos vehine maleakh yeho nirea vachalom el-yosef beerets mitserayim
vayomer elayv qum qach et-hayeled veet-imo velekh shuv el-erets yiserael ki metu hamevaqeshim et-nefesh hayaled
vayaqam vayiqach et-hayeled veet-imo vayavo aretsa yiserael
ukheshame'o ki arekhelos malakh bihuda tachat horedos aviv vayira lalekhet shama vayetsuve vachalom vayelekh lo el-aretsot hagalil
vayavo vayeshev be'ir haniqeret netsaret lemalt hadavar haneemar 'al-pi haneviim ki natseri yiqare lo
bayamim hahem qam yochanan hamatebil vayehi qore vemidebar yehuda lemor
shuvu ki malekhut hashamayim qareva lavo
ki ze hu asher niba 'alayv yesha'eyahu hanavi lemor qol qore vamidebar panu derekh yeho yasheru mesilotayv
veyochanan levusho se'ar gemalim veezor 'or bematenayv umaakhalo chagavim udevash haya'ar
vatetse elayv yerushalayim vekhal-yehuda vekhal-kikar hayareden
vayitavelu 'al-yado bayareden vayitevadu et-chatotam
vayehy kireoto rabim min-haperushim vehatsaduqim nigashim lehitavel vayomer lahem yaledey tsife'onim mi hisekil etekhem lehimalet min-haqetsef he'atid lavo
lakhen 'aso feri rauy lateshuva
veal-tacheshevu vilevavekhem lemor averaham hu avinu ki ani omer lakhem ki min-haavanim haele yakhol haelohim lehaqim banim leaveraham
ukhevar husam hagarezen 'al-shoresh ha'etsim vehine khal-'ets asher eynenu 'ose peri tov yikaret veyushelakh baesh
hen anokhi tovel etekhem bamayim lateshuva vehaba acharay chazaq mimeni asher qatoneti miseet ne'alayv vehu yitebol etekhem berucha haqodesh uvaesh
uveyado hamizere vezara et-gareno veasaf et-degano el-otsaro veet-hamots yiserefenu vaesh asher lo tikhebe
vayavo yeshu'a min-hagalil hayaredena el-yochanan lehitavel 'al-yado
veyochanan chasakh oto lemor anokhi tsarikh lehitavel 'al-yadekha veata ba elay
vaya'an yeshu'a vayomer elayv hanicha li ki khen naava lisheneynu lemale kal-hatsedaqa vayanach lo
vayehi kaasher nitebal yeshu'a vayemaher vaya'al min-hamayim vehine hashamayim nifetechu-lo vayare et-rucha elohim yoredet keyona venacha 'alayv
vehine qol min-hashamayim omer ze beni yedidi asher-ratsiti bo
az nasa harucha et-yeshu'a hamidebara lema'an yenasehu hasatan
vayehi acharey tsumo areba'im yom veareba'im layela vayire'av
vayigash elayv hamenase vayomar im ben-haelohim ata daber laavanim haele vetiheyeyna lelachem
vaya'an vayomar hen katuv lo 'al-halechem levado yicheye haadam ki 'al-kal-motsa fi-yeho
vayisaehu hasatan el-'ir haqodesh vaya'amidehu 'al-pinat-gag beyt hamiqedash
vayomer elayv im ben-haelohim ata nefol lemata ki khatuv ki maleakhayv yetsaveh-lakh ve'al-kapayim yisaunekha pen-tigof baeven ragelekha
vayomer elayv yeshu'a ve'od katuv lo tenase et yeho eloheykha
vayosef hasatan vayisaehu el-har gavoha meod vayareehu et-kal mamelekhot tevel ukhevodan
vayomer elayv kal-zot lekha etenena im-tiqod vetishetachave li
vayomer elayv yeshu'a sur mimeni hasatan ki khatuv layho eloheykha tishetachave veoto levado ta'avod
vayiref mimenu hasatan vehine nigeshu elayv maleakhim vayesharatuhu
vayehi kishemo'a yeshu'a ki hisegiru et-yochanan vayelekh el erets hagalil
vayetse minetseret vayavo vayeshev bikhefar-nachum asher 'al-shefat hayam bigevul zevulun venafetali
lemalot haneemar 'al-pi yesha'eyahu hanavi lemor
aretsa zevulun vearetsa nafetali derekh hayam 'ever hayareden gelil hagoyim
ha'am haholekhim bachoshekh rau or gadol yshevey beerets tsalemavet or nagah 'aleyhem
min-ha'et hahi hechel yeshu'a liqero qaro veamor shuvu ki malekhut hashamayim qareva lavo
vayehi behitehalekho 'al-yad yam-hagalil vayare vehine sheney anashim achim shime'on haniqera feteros veanederay achiv mashelikhim metsoda bayam ki dayagim hem
vayomer aleyhem lekhu acharay vaasimekhem ledayegey anashim
vaya'azevu mehera et hamikhemorot vayelekhu acharayv
vayehi ke'avero misham vayare sheney anashim achim acherim et-ya'aqov ben-zaveday veet-yochanan achiv baoniya 'im-zaveday avihem vehema metaqenim et-mikhemerotam vayiqera aleyhem
vaya'azevu mehera et-haoniya veet-avihem vayelekhu acharayv
vayasav yeshu'a bekhal-hagalil vayelamed bikhenesioteyhem vayevaser besorat hamalekhut vayerape kal-machala vekhal-madeve ba'am
veshime'o yatsa bekhal-erets sureya vayaviu elayv et kal-hacholim hame'unim bekhal-cholayim umakheovim vaachuzey shedim umukey yarecha unekhey evarim vayirepaem
vayelekhu acharayv hamonim hamonim min-hagalil umin-'eser he'arim vemirushalayim vihuda ume'ever layareden
vayehi kireoto et-hamon ha'am vaya'al hahara vayeshev sham vayigeshu elayv talemidayv
vayifetach et-piv vayorem vayomar
asherey 'aniyey harucha ki lahem malekhut hashamayim
asherey haavelim ki-hem yenuchamu
asherey ha'anavim ki-hema yireshu arets
asherey hare'evim vehatsemeim latsedaqa ki-hem yiseba'u
asherey harachamanim ki-hem yeruchamu
asherey barey levav ki-hem yechezu et-haelohim
asherey rodefey shalom ki-veney elohim yiqare lahem
asherey haniredafim bigelal hatsedaqa ki lahem malekhut hashamayim
ashereykhem ki-yecharafu veradefu etekhem vediberu 'aleykhem besheqer kal-ra' ba'avuri
simechu vegilu ki sekharekhem rav bashamayim ki-khen radefu et-haneviim asher hayu lifeneykhem
atem melach haarets veim-hamelach haya tafel bame yamelach hen lo-yitselach 'od lakol ki im-lehashelikh chutsa vehaya miremas liveney adam
atem oro shel-'olam 'ir yoshevet 'al-hahar lo tisater
gam eyn madeliqim ner lasom oto tachat haeyfa ki im-'al-hamenora lehair lekhal-asher babayit
ken yaer orekhem lifeney beney haadam lema'an yireu ma'aseykhem hatovim veshibechu et-avikhem shebashamayim
al-tedamu ki vati lehafer et-hatora o et-diverey haneviim lo vati lehafer ki im-lemalt
ki amen omer ani lakhem 'ad ki-ya'averu hashamayim vehaarets lo ta'avor yod achat o-qots echad min-hatora 'ad asher yequyam hakol

lakhen haish asher yafer achat min-hamitseot haqetanot haele vilamed et-beney haadam la'asot kamohu qaton yiqare lo bemalekhut hashamayim vaasher ya'ase vilamed otan laze gadol yiqare bemalekhut hashamayim
ki ani omer lakhem im lo-tiheye tsideqatekhem meruba mitsideqat hasoferim vehaperushim lo tavou bemalekhut hashamayim
halo shema'etem ki neemar larishonim lo tiretsach vaasher yiretsach chayav hu leveyt din
vaani omer lakhem kal-asher yiqetsof 'al-achiv chinam chayav hu leveyt din vaasher yomar el-achiv reqa chayav hu lesanehederin vaasher naval yiqera lo hu mechuyav esh geyhinom
lakhen im-taqeriv qarebanekha el-hamizebech vezakhareta ki-yesh leachikha devar riv 'imakh
hanach sham et-qarebanekha lifeney hamizebech velekh kaper et-peney achikha veacharey khen bo haqerev et-qarebanekha
maher hiteratse leish rivekha be'odekha vaderekh ito pen-yasegirekha ish rivekha el-hashofet vehashofet yasegirekha lashoter vehashelakheta el-beyt hakele
amen omer ani lakh lo tetse misham 'ad im-shilameta et-haperuta haacharona
shema'etem ki neemar larishonim lo tineaf
vaani omer lakhem kal-hamisetakel beisha lachemod otah naof neafah belibo
veim takheshilekha 'eyn yeminekha naqer otah vehashelekh mimekha ki tov lekha asher yovad echad meevareykha meredet kal-gufekha el-geyhinom
veim-yadekha hayemanit takheshilekha qatsets otah vehashelekh mimekha ki tov lekha asher yovad echad meevareykha meredet kal-gufekha el-geyhinom
veneemar ish ki yeshalach et-isheto venatan lah sefer keritut
vaani omer lakhem hameshalecha et-isheto bileti 'al-devar zenut meviah lidey niufim vehalqecha et-hagerusha lo leisha noef hu
'od shema'etem ki neemar larishonim lo tishava' lashaqer veshalem loyho shevu'oteykha
vaani omer lakhem lo tishave'u kal-shevu'a lo vashamayim ki-khise elohim hema
velo vaarets ki-hadom ragelayv hi velo virushalayim ki-hi qireyat melekh rav
af bechayey roshekha al-tishave'a ki-lo tukhal lahafokh sa'ara achat lilevana o lishechora
akhe-yehi devarekhem hen hen lo lo vehayoter 'al ele min-hara' hu
shema'etem ki neemar 'ayin tachat 'ayin shen tachat shen
vaani omer lakhem al-titeqomamu larasha' vehamake otekha 'al-halechi hayemanit hateh-lo gam et-haacheret
vaasher yachepots lariv 'imekha velaqachat et-kutanetekha ten-lo gam et-hame'il
vehaones otekha lalekhet 'imo derekh mil lekh ito shenayim
hashel meitekha ten-lo vehaba lileot mimekha al-tashev panayv
shema'etem ki neemar veahaveta lere'akha vesaneta et-oyevekha
vaani omer lakhem ehevu et-oyeveykhem barakhu et-meqaleleykhem heytivu lesneeykhem vehitepalalu be'ad makheiveykhem v rodefeykhem
lema'an tiheyu vanim laavikhem shebashamayim asher hu mazericha shimesho lara'im velatovim umametir 'al-hatsadiqim vegam 'al-haresha'im
ki im-teehavu et-ohaveykhem mah-sekharekhem halo gam-hamokhesim ya'aso-zot
veim-tishealu lishelom acheykhem bilevad mah-shivechakhem halo gam-hamokhesim ya'aso-zot
lakhen heyu shelemim kaasher avikhem shebashamayim shalem hu
hishameru lakhem me'asot tsideqatekhem lifeney beney adam leheraot lahem ki im-ken eyn-lakhem sakhar meet avikhem shebashamayim
lakhen ba'asotekha tsedaqa al-tari'a lefaneykha basofar kaasher ya'aso hachanefim bevatey khenesiot uvarechovot lema'an yehalalu otam haanashim amen omer ani lakhem hema naseu et sekharam
veata ba'asotekha tsedaqa al-teda' semolekha et asher 'osa yeminekha
lema'an tiheye tsideqatekha basater veavikha haroe bamisetarim hu bagaluy yigemelekha
vekhi titepalel al-tehi kachanefim haohavim lehitepalel be'amedam bevatey khenesiot uvefinot hashevaqim lema'an yerau liveney adam amen omer ani lakhem hema naseu et sekharam
veata ki titepalel bo vechederekha usegor delatekha ba'adekha vehitepalel el-avikha asher basater veavikha haroe bamisetarim hu bagaluy yigemelekha

veatem al-tidamu lahem ki yode'a avikhem kal-tsarekekhem beterem tishealu mimenu
lakhen ko titepalalu avinu shebashamayim yiteqadash shemekha
tabo malekhutekha ye'ase retsonekha kaasher bashamayim gam baarets
et-lechem chuqenu ten-lanu hayom
umechal-lanu 'al-chovoteynu kaasher machalenu gam-anachenu lechayaveynu

ki im-timechalu liveney-adam 'al-chatotam yimechal gam-lakhem avikhem shebashamayim
veim lo timechalu liveney adam gam-avikhem lo-yimechal lechatoteykhem
vekhi tatsumu al-tiheyu zo'afim kachanefim hameshanim et-peneyhem leheraot tsamim liveney adam amen omer ani lakhem hema naseu et-sekharam

asher lo-terae tsam liveney adam ki im-leavikha basater veavikha haroe bamisetarim hu bagaluy yigemelekha

ki-amen omer ani lakhem neviim vetsadiqim rabim nikhesefu lireot et asher atem roim velo rau velishemo'a et asher atem shome'im velo shame'u
lakhen atem shime'u-na et meshal hazore'a
kal-ish shome'a et-devar hamalekhut velo yevinehu uva hara' vechataf et-hazaru'a bilevavo hu hanizera' 'al-yad hadarekh
vehanizera' 'al-meqom hasela'im hu hashome'a et-hadavar umiyad yiqachenu vesimecha
velo eyn shoresh tachetayv veyaqum raq lesha'a uviheyot tsara uredifa bigelal hadavar yikashel keraga'
vehanizera' el-haqotsim hu hashome'a et-hadavar vedaagat ha'olam haze venikheley ha'osher yema'akhu et-hadavar uferi lo-yiheye lo
vehanizera' 'al-haadama hatova hu hashome'a et-hadavar umevin oto af-ya'ase feri venatan ze mea she'arim veze shishim veze sheloshim
vayasem lifeneyhem mashal acher vayomar malekhut hashamayim doma leadam asher zara' zera' tov besadehu
vayehi biheyot haanashim yeshenim vayavo oyevo vayizera' zunin beyn hachitim vayelekh lo
vekhaasher parach hadeshe vaya'as peri vayerau gam-hazunin
vayigeshu 'avedey va'al-habayit vayomeru elayv adoneynu halo-zera' tov zara'eta vesadekha umeayin lo hazunin
vayomer lahem ish oyev 'asa zot vayomeru elayv ha'avadim hatachepots ki-nelekh unelaqet otam
vayomer lo pen-telaqetu et-hazunin vesherashetem gam et-hachitim
hanichu otam veyigedelu sheneyhem yachad 'ad-haqatsir vehaya be'et haqatsir veamareti laqotserim laqetu varishona et-hazunin veigedu otam agudot lesarefam veet hachitim isefu leotsari
vayasem lifeneyhem mashal acher vayomar malekhut hashamayim doma legaregar shel-charedal asher leqacho ish vayizera' besadehu
vehu qaton mikal-hazero'im vekhaasher tsamach gadol hu min-hayeraqot vehaya le'ets 'ad-asher yavou 'of hashamayim veqinenu ba'anafayv
vayisa 'od meshalo vayomer aleyhem malekhut hashamayim doma liseor asher leqachatu isha vatitemon bishelsh seim qemach 'ad ki-yechemats kulo
kal-ele diber yeshu'a bimeshalim el-hamon ha'am uviveli mashal lo diber aleyhem davar
lemalt et asher diber hanavi lemor efetecha bemashal pi abi'a chidot mini-qedem
az shilach yeshu'a et-hamon ha'am vayavo habayeta vayigeshu elayv talemidayv vayomeru baer-na lanu et-meshal zuney hasade
vaya'an vayomer aleyhem hazore'a et-hazera' hatov hu ben-haadam
vehasade hu ha'olam vehazera' hatov beney hamalekhut hem vehazunin beney hara' hema
vehaoyev asher zera'am hu hasatan vehaqatsir hu qets ha'olam vehaqotserim hem hamaleakhim
vehine kaasher yeluqetu hazunin veniserefu vaesh ken yiheye leqets ha'olam haze
ben-haadam yishelach et-maleakhayv veliqetu mimalekhuto et kal-hamakheshelot veet kal-po'aley haaven
vehishelikhu otam el-tanur haesh sham tiheye hayelala vacharoq hashinayim
az yazehiru hatsadiqim kashemesh bemalekhut avihem mi asher lo azenayim lishemo'a yishema'
'od doma malekhut hashamayim leotsar tamun basade asher metsao ish vayitemenehu uvesimechato yelekh umakhar et-kal-asher-lo veqana et-hasade hahu
'od doma malekhut hashamayim leish socher hamevaqesh maregaliot tovot
vekhaasher matsa maregalit achat yeqara meod halakh vayimekor et-kal-asher-lo vayiqen otah
'od doma malekhut hashamayim lemikhemeret asher hashelekha layam uminim shonim yeasefu letokhah
vekhaasher nimelea he'elu otah el-sefat hayam vayeshevu vayileqetu et-haminim hatovim letokh hakelim veet hara'im hishelikhu
ken yiheye leqets ha'olam hamaleakhim yetseu vehivedilu et-haresha'im mitokh hatsadiqim
vehishelikhum el-tanur haesh sham tiheye hayelala vacharoq hashinayim
vayomer aleyhem yeshu'a hatavinu et-kal-ele vayomeru elayv hen adoneynu
vayomer aleyhem 'al-ken kal-sofer melumad lemalekhut hashamayim dome leish ba'al-bayit hamotsi meotsaro chadashot vegam yeshanot
vayehi kekhalot yeshu'a ledaber et-hameshalim haele vaya'avor misham
vayavo el-aretso vayelamed otam beveyt hakeneset shelahem vayishetomamu vayomeru meayin laze hachakhema hazot vehagevurot
halo ze hu ben-hecharash halo shem imo mireyam veechayv ya'aqov veyosey veshime'on vihuda
veacheyotayv halo khulan itanu hen umeayin eyfo lo kal-ele
vayehi lahem lemikheshol vayomer yeshu'a aleyhem eyn hanavi niqele im-lo bearetso uveveyto
velo-'asa sham gevurot rabot mipeney choser emunatam
ba'et hahi shama' horedos sar-rova' hamedina et shema' yeshu'a
vayomer el-ne'arayv ze hu yochanan hamatebil asher ne'or min-hametim 'al-ken hakochot po'alim bo
ki horedos tafas et-yochanan vayaaserehu vayesimehu beveyt hasohar bigelal horodeya eshet filipos achiv
ki amar yochanan elayv asura hi lakh
vayevaqesh leharego vayira et-hehamon ki lenavi chashavuhu
vayehi beyom huledet horedos vateraqed bat-horodeya betokham vatitav be'eyney horedos
vayishava' lah vayomar mah-tisheal nafeshekh veeten lakh
veimah sama et-hadevarim befiha vatisheal lemor tenah-li fo baqe'ara et-rosh yochanan hamatebil
vayetser lamelekh akh ba'avur hashevu'a vehamesubim 'imo tsiva latet lah
vayishelach vayisa et-rosh yochanan me'alayv beveyt hasohar
vayaviu et-rosho baqe'ara vayitenu videy hana'ara vateviehu el-imah
vayigeshu talemidayv vayiseu et-geviyato vayiqeberuha vayelekhu vayagidu leyeshu'a
vayehi keshame'o et-zot vayasar misham baoniya el-meqom chareba veeyn-ish ito vayisheme'u hamon ha'am vayelekhu acharayv berageleyhem min-he'arim
vayetse yeshu'a vayare hamon 'am-rav vayehemu me'ayv lahem vayerape et-hachalashim asher bahem
vayehi le'et 'erev vayigeshu elayv talemidayv vayomeru hamaqom charev vegam-nata hayom shalecha et-hamon ha'am veyelekhu el-hakefarim liqenot lahem okhel
vayomer aleyhem eynam tserikhim lalakhet tenu-atem lahem leekhol
vayomeru elayv eyn-lanu fo ki im-chameshet kikerot-lechem usheney dagim
vayomar havium elay hena

vayetsav et-ha'am lashevet 'al-hadeshe vayiqach et-chameshet kikerot-halechem veet-sheney hadagim vayisa 'eynayv hashamayema vayevarekh vayiferos vayiten et-halechem latalemidim vehatalemidim natenu la'am
vayokhelu khulam vayiseba'u vayiseu min-hapetotim hanotarim sheneym 'asar salim meleim
vehaokhelim kachameshet alafim ish milevad hanashim vehataf
vayaets yeshu'a betalemidayv laredet baoniya la'avor lefanayv el-'ever hayam 'ad asher-yeshalach et-ha'am
vayeshalach et-ha'am vaya'al hahara badad lehitepalel vayehi-'erev vehu levado shama
vehaoniya vaa 'ad chatsi hayam vehagalim yiterefuha ki harucha lenegedah
vayehi beashemoret harevi'it vayavo aleyhem yeshu'a vehu mehalekh 'al-peney hayam
vehatalemidim rau oto mehalekh 'al-peney hayam vayibahalu vayomeru mareeh-rucha hu vayitse'aqu mipachad
vayemaher yeshu'a vayedaber aleyhem lemor chizequ ki-ani hu al-tirau
vaya'an peteros vayomer elayv im-ata hu adoni tsaveh-na veavo eleykha 'al-hamayim
vayomer bo vayered peteros min-haoniya vayehalekh 'al-peney hamayim lavo el-yeshu'a
vayehi kireoto et-harucha ki chazaqa hi vayira vayachel litebo'a vayitse'aq vayomar adoni hoshi'eni
vayemaher yeshu'a vayishelach et-yado vayachazeq-bo vayomer elayv qeton emuna mah-lekha ki chalaq libekha
hem 'alu el-haoniya veharucha shakhakha
veaneshey haoniya nigeshu vayishetachavu-lo vayomeru aval ben-elohim ata
vaya'averu et-hayam vayavou aretsa gineysar
vayakiru oto aneshey hamaqom hahu vayishelechu el-kal-sevivoteyhem vayaviu elayv et kal-hacholim
vayevaqeshu mimenu raq linego'a bikhenaf bigedo vekhal-hanoge'im nosha'u
az bau el-yeshu'a hasoferim vehaperushim asher mirushalayim
vayomeru madu'a talemideykha 'overim et qabalat hazeqenim ki eynam notelim yedeyhem lase'uda
vaya'an vayomer aleyhem madu'a gam-atem 'overim et-mitsevat elohim lema'an qabalatekhem
ki haelohim tsiva lemor kabed et-avikha veet-imekha umeqalel aviv veimo mot yumat
veatem omerim haomer leaviv uleimo qareban mah-shaata nehene li eyno chayav bekhibud aviv veimo
vataferu et-devar haelohim lema'an qabalatekhem
chanefim heytev niba 'aleykhem yesha'eyahu lemor
nigash ha'am haze befiv uvisefatayv kibeduni velibam rachaq mimeni
vatehi yireatam oti mitsevat anashim melumada
vayiqera el-ha'am vayomer lahem shime'u vehavinu
lo hanikhenas el-hape yetame et-haadam ki im-hayotse min-hape hu metame et-haadam
vayigeshu elayv talemidayv vayomeru hayada'eta ki haperushim shame'u et-hadavar haze vayikashelu-vo
vaya'an vayomar kal-mata' asher lo nata' avi shebashamayim 'aqor ye'aqer
hanichu otam maderikhim 'iverim hema la'iverim vekhi-yaderikh 'iver et-ha'iver venafelu sheneyhem el-hashachat
vaya'an peteros vayomer elayv baer lanu et-hamashal haze
vayomer yeshu'a 'adena gam-atem lo tasekilu
ha'od lo tede'u ki khal-haba el-hape yored el-hakeres veyishafekh misham lemotsaot
aval hayotse min-hape yotse min-halev vehu metame et-haadam
ki min-halev yotseot macheshevot ra' retsichot niufim zenunim genevot 'edut sheqer vegidufim
ele hem hametameim et-haadam aval akhila belo netilat yadayim lo tetame et-haadam
vayetse yeshu'a misham vayasar el-gelilot tsor vetsidon
vehine isha khena'anit yotset min-hagevulot hahem vatitse'aq elayv lemor chaneni adoni ven-david ki viti me'una meod 'al-yedey shed
velo-'ana otah davar vayigeshu talemidayv vayevaqeshu mimenu lemor shalecheha ki-tso'eqet hi achareynu
vaya'an vayomar lo shulacheti bileti el-hatson haovedot asher leveyt yiserael
vehi vaa vatishetachu lo vatomar adoni 'azereni
vaya'an vayomar lo-tov laqachat et-lechem habanim ulehashelikho lifeney tse'irey hakelavim
vatomar ken adoni efes ki-gam-tse'irey hakelavim yokhelu min-haperurim hanofelim me'al-shulechan adoneyhem
vaya'an yeshu'a vayomer eleyha isha raba emunatekh yehi-lakh kiretsonekh vaterafe vitah min-hasha'a hahi
vaya'avor yeshu'a misham vayavo el-yam hagalil vaya'al hahara vayeshev sham
vayavou elayv hamon 'am rav ve'imahem pisechim 'iverim ilemim qite'im verabim kahema vayapilum lerageley yeshu'a vayirepaem
vayitemehu ha'am bireotam et-hailemim medaberim vehaqite'im beriim vehapisechim mehalekhim veha'iverim roim vayeshabechu et-elohey yiserael
vayiqera yeshu'a el-talemidayv vayomar nikhemeru rachamay 'al-ha'am ki-ze 'amedam 'imadi sheloshet yamim veeyn lahem mah-leekhol veeyneni chafets leshalecham re'evim pen-yite'alefu badarekh
vayomeru elayv hatalemidim meayin lanu bamidebar dey-lechem lehasebi'a et-hamon rav kaze
vayomer yeshu'a aleyhem kama khikerot lechem lakhem vayomeru sheva' ume'at dagim qetanim
vayetsav et-hamon ha'am vayeshevu laarets
vayiqach et-sheva' kikerot halechem veet hadagim vayevarekh vayiferos vayiten el-hatalemidim vehatalemidim natenu la'am
vayokhelu khulam vayiseba'u vayiseu min-hapetotim hanotarim shive'a dudim meleim
vehaokhelim areba'at alafim ish milevad hanashim vehataf
vayeshalach et-ha'am vayered baoniya vayavo el-gevul magedan
vayigeshu haperushim vehatsaduqim lenasoto vayishealu meito lehareotam ot min-hashamayim
vaya'an vayomer lahem ba'erev tomeru yom-tsach yiheye ki ademu hashamayim
uvaboqer tomeru hayom sa'ar ki-ademu vehiteqaderu hashamayim chanefim atem makirim et-peney hashamayim veotot ha'itim lo takiru
dor ra' umenaef mevaqesh-lo ot veot lo yinaten-lo bileti im-ot yona hanavi vaya'azevem vayelekh lo
vayavou hatalemidim el-'ever hayam vehem shakhechu laqachat itam lachem
vayomer yeshu'a aleyhem reu vehishameru lakhem miseor haperushim vehatsaduqim
vayacheshevu kho vakho beqirebam vayomeru 'al-devar shel-laqachenu itanu lachem
vayeda' yeshu'a vayomer aleyhem qetaney emuna mah-tacheshevu bilevavekhem asher lo-leqachetem itekhem lachem
ha'od lo tasekilu velo tizekeru et-chameshet kikerot-halechem lachameshet alafim ish vekhama salim nesatem
veet-sheva' kikerot halechem leareba'at alafim ish vekhama dudim nesatem
eykh lo tavinu ki lo 'al-halechem amareti aleyhem hishameru lakhem miseor haperushim vehatsaduqim
az hevinu ki lo amar lahem lehishamer miseor halechem ki im-milimud haperushim vehatsaduqim
vayehi kevo yeshu'a el-gelilot qeyasari shel-filipos vayisheal et-talemidayv lemor mah-omerim li veney adam mi hu ben-haadam
vayomeru yesh omerim yochanan hamatebil hu veyesh omerim eliyahu vaacherim omerim yiremeyahu o echad min-haneviim
vayomer aleyhem veatem mah-tomeru li mi ani
vaya'an shime'on peteros vayomar ata hu hamashicha ben-elohim chayim
vaya'an vayomer elayv ashereykha shime'on bar-yona ki-vasar vadam lo gilah-lekha et-zot ki im-avi shebashamayim
vegam-ani omer lekha ki ata peteros ve'al-hatsur haze evene et-qehilati vesha'arey sheol lo yigeberu 'aleyha
veeten lekha et-mafetechot malekhut hashamayim vekhal-asher teesor 'al-haarets asur yiheye bashamayim vekhal-asher tatir 'al-haarets mutar yiheye bashamayim
az tsiva 'al-talemidayv asher lo yesaperu leish ki hu hamashicha
min-ha'et hahi hechel yeshu'a lehagid letalemidayv ki tsarikh hu lalekhet yerushalayim vi'une harebe midey hazeqenim verashey hakohanim vehasoferim veyehareg uvayom hashelishi qom yaqum
vayiqachehu feteros vayachel lige'ar-bo lemor chas lekha adoni al-yehi-lekha kazot
vayifen vayomer lefeteros sur me'alay hasatan mikheshol ata li ki libekha lediverey veney-adam velo lediverey elohim
vayomer yeshu'a el-talemidayv ish ki-yachepots lalekhet acharay yekhachesh be'atsemo venasa et-tseluvo vehalakh acharay
ki hechafets lehatsil et-nafesho tovad nafesho mimenu vehameabed nafesho lema'ani hu yimetsaena
ki mah-yo'il haadam sheyiqene et-kal-ha'olam vehishechit et-nafesho o mah-yiten haadam pideyon nafesho
ki ben-haadam 'atid lavo bikhevod aviv 'im-maleakhayv veaz yeshalem lekhal-ish kema'asehu
amen omer ani lakhem ki yesh ba'omedim po asher lo-yite'amu ta'am mita 'ad ki-yireu et-ben-haadam ba bemalekhuto
umiqets sheshet yamim laqach lo yeshu'a et-peteros veet-ya'aqov veet-yochanan achiv vaya'alem badad 'al-har gavoha
vayishetane le'eyneyhem vayazehiru fanayv kashemesh uvegadayv kaor hilebinu
vehine nireu aleyhem mshe veeliyahu vehem midaberim ito
vaya'an peteros vayomer el-yeshu'a adoni tov lanu liheyot po im-tov be'eyneykha na'ase po shalsho sukot lekha achat ulemshe achat uleeliyahu echat
'odenu medaber vehine 'anan-or hetsal 'aleyhem vehine qol mitokh he'anan omer zeh-beni yedidi asher ratsiti vo elayv tishema'un
vayehi kishemo'a hatalemidim vayipelu 'al-peneyhem vayireu meod
vayigash yeshu'a vayiga'-bam vayomar qumu al-tirau
vayiseu 'eyneyhem velo rau ish bileti yeshu'a levado
uveridetam min-hahar tsiva 'aleyhem yeshu'a lemor lo tagidu leish et-devar hamaree 'ad im-qam ben-haadam me'im hametim
vayishealuhu talemidayv lemor mah-ze omerim hasoferim eliyahu bo yavo barishona
vaya'an yeshu'a vayomer aleyhem akhen eliyahu yavo varishona veheshiv et-hakol
aval omer ani lakhem eliyahu kevar ba velo hikiruhu vaya'aso-vo kiretsonam vekhen gam-ben-haadam ye'une 'al-yadam
az hevinu hatalemidim ki 'al-yochanan hamatebil diber aleyhem
vayehi kevoam el-hamon ha'am vayigash elayv ish vayikhera' 'al-birekayv lenegedo
vayomar adoni rachem-na 'al-beni ki-muke yarecha hu vechaleyo ra' ki-fe'amim rabot hu nofel baesh ufe'amim rabot el-tokh hamayim
vaavi oto el-talemideykha velo yakhelu lirepo lo
vaya'an yeshu'a vayomer hoy dor chasar emuna ufetaletol 'ad-matay eheye 'imakhem 'ad-matay esa etekhem haviu oto elay hena
vayige'ar-bo yeshu'a vayetse hashed mimenu vayerafe hana'ar min-hasha'a hahi
vayigeshu hatalemidim el-yeshu'a vehu levado vayomeru madu'a anachenu lo yakholenu legarasho

vayomer yeshu'a aleyhem mipeney choser emunatekhem ki amen omer ani lakhem im-yesh bakhem emuna kegaregar hacharedal vaamaretem el-hahar haze he'ateq mize shama vene'etaq mimeqomo veeyn davar asher yibatser mikem
vehamin haze lo yetse ki im-bitefila uvetsom
vayehi be'averam beerets hagalil vayomer aleyhem yeshu'a 'atid ben-haadam lehimaser bidey anashim
vayahareguhu uvayom hashelishi qom yaqum vayite'atsevu meod
vayehi kevoam el-kefar-nachum vayigeshu el-peteros gabaey machatsit hashaqel vayomeru halo yiten rabekhem et-machatsit hashaqel
vayomer yiten uvevoo habayeta qidem oto yeshu'a lisheol vayomar mah-da'etekha shime'on malekhey haarets mimi yiqechu mekhes umas meet beneyhem o meet hazarim
vayomer peteros elayv meet hazarim vayomer lo yeshu'a im-ken efo habanim peturim hema

veulam lema'an asher-lo-niheye lahem lemikheshol lekh el-hayam vehishelakheta chaka el-tokho veet-hadag harishon asher ya'ale saehu vekhaasher tifetach et-piv timetsa vo matebe'a oto qach veshaqaleta 'al yadi ve'al yadekha
basha'a hahi nigeshu hatalemidim el-yeshu'a vayomeru mi efo hagadol bemalekhut hashamayim
vayiqera yeshu'a elayv yeled qatan vaya'amidehu vetokham
vayomar amen omer ani lakhem im-lo tashuvu liheyot kayeladim lo tavou el-malekhut hashamayim
lakhen kal-hamashepil et-'atsemo kayeled haze hu hagadol bemalekhut hashamayim
vehameqabel yeled echad kaze bishemi oti hu meqabel
hamakheshil et-echad min-haqetanim haele hamaaminim bi nocha lo sheyitale felach-rekhev 'al-tsavaro vetuba' bimetsulot yam
oy la'olam min-hamikhesholim ki hamikhesholim bo yavou aval oy laish hahu asher 'al-yado yavo hamikheshol
veim-takheshilekha yadekha o ragelekha qatsets otah vehashelekh mimeaa tov lekha lavo lachayim pisecha o qite'a miheyot lekha shetey yadayim o-shetey ragelayim vetushelakh el-esh 'olam
veim-'eynekha takheshilekha naqer otah vehashelekh mimeaa tov lekha lavo lachayim be'ayin achat miheyot lekha shetey 'eynayim vetushelakh el-esh geyhinom
reu pen-tivezu achad haqetanim haele ki omer ani lakhem maleakheyhem roim tamid et-peney avi shebashamayim
ki ven-haadam ba lehoshi'a et-haoved
mah-da'etekhem ki-yiheyu leish mea khevasim veavad echad mehem halo ya'azov et-hatishe'im vetishe'a 'al-heharim vehalakh levaqesh et-haoved
vehaya kaasher yimetsaehu amen omer ani lakhem ki-yisemach 'alayv yoter me'al hatishe'im vetishe'a asher lo avadu
ken eynenu ratson milifeney avikhem shebashamayim sheyovad echad min-haqetanim haele
vekhi yecheta-lekha achikha lekh vehokhacheta oto beynekha leveyno veim-yishema' eleykha qanita lekha achikha
veim-lo yishema' velaqachata 'imekha 'od echad o shenayim ki 'al-pi shenayim o shelosha 'edim yaqum kal-davar
veim-lo yishema' aleyhem vehigadeta el-haqahal veim-lo yishema' gam-el-haqahal vehaya lekha kegoy ukhemokhes
amen omer ani lakhem kol asher-taaseru 'al-haarets asur yiheye bashamayim vekhol asher-tatiru 'al-haarets mutar yiheye bashamayim
ve'od omer ani lakhem shenayim mikem ki-yiheyu lev echad baarets 'al-kal-davar asher yishealu bo yavo lahem meet avi shebashamayim
ki vekhal-maqom asher yeasefu shenayim o shelosha bishemi sham ani betokham
vayigash elayv peteros vayomer lo adoni kama pe'amim yecheta-li achi umachaleti lo ha'ad sheva' pe'amim
